title: Section 18
content: (1) The Board may, whenever it considers necessary, establish either generally or for a particular purpose or for any specified area or areas committees for the supervision of 1[auqaf]. (2) The constitution, functions and duties and the term of office of such committees shall be determined from time to time by the Board: Provided that it shall not be necessary for the members of such committees to be members of the Board.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 27 of 2013, s. 4, for wakfs (w.e.f. 01-11-2013).
